name: cipher
plan: Currently at 82 Eridani Star — a known location for the first time in many steps. Previous failures stem from agents running wrong commands (travel instead of find_route) and being in 'unknown' locations. 82 Eridani has no station (per diary), so I must leave. Muscida is nearest at 240 GU. Since location is now known, find_route should finally work. Plan: confirm route to Muscida, then travel there, scan for stations, and dock. Being extremely minimal — one command per step — to prevent agent drift.
currentGoal: Dock at any available station in this system. Run sm dock or sm travel <station_id> then sm dock. If no station exists, report that clearly.
